allow: PowerShell($files = @\("Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\PacketMessage.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\PacketQueue.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\PacketDispatcher.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\LogicEventor.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\LogicService.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Handlers\\AliveHandler.cs"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); if \(-not \($b.Length -ge 3 -and $b[0] -eq 0xEF -and $b[1] -eq 0xBB -and $b[2] -eq 0xBF\)\) { $bom = [byte[]]\(0xEF,0xBB,0xBF\); $out = New-Object byte[] \($bom.Length + $b.Length\); [Array]::Copy\($bom, 0, $out, 0, $bom.Length\); [Array]::Copy\($b, 0, $out, $bom.Length, $b.Length\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($f, $out\); "BOM 추가: $f" } else { "이미 BOM: $f" } })

PowerShell($files = @\("Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\ELogicEvent.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\LogicEventor.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\OutGameLogicEventor.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\PacketDistributor.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\PlayerExecutor.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\Logic\\OutGameService.cs","Server\\THGameServer\\GameServerApp.cs"\); $utf8Bom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($true\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($f, $text, $utf8Bom\) }; foreach \($f in $files\) { $b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); "{0,-60} {1:X2} {2:X2} {3:X2}" -f $f,$b[0],$b[1],$b[2] })
PowerShell($c = Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "cargo: $\($c.Source\)"; cargo --version } else { "cargo: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/rtk-ai/rtk/releases/latest" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "ps" }; "tag: $\($r.tag_name\)"; $r.assets | Select-Object name, @{n='size_MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.size/1MB,2\)}}, browser_download_url | Format-List)

PowerShell($p = "C:\\Users\\juyeo\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Project\\THGame\\Server\\THServerCommon\\DefineEnum.cs"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); if \($bytes[0] -ne 0xEF -or $bytes[1] -ne 0xBB -or $bytes[2] -ne 0xBF\) { $bom = [byte[]]\(0xEF,0xBB,0xBF\); $out = New-Object byte[] \($bom.Length + $bytes.Length\); [Array]::Copy\($bom,0,$out,0,3\); [Array]::Copy\($bytes,0,$out,3,$bytes.Length\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($p,$out\); "BOM added" } else { "BOM already present" })
